headline: On This Day: Nazis invade Low Countries to bypass France's Maginot Line
summary: On this date in history:In 1865, Confederate President Jefferson Davis was captured by Union troops. He spent the next two years in prison.In 1869, the golden spike was driven at Promontory, Utah,...
